summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Uncle Gio's retro-futuristic AI storytelling website. All backend APIs working perfectly and frontend design successfully implements the requested retro-futuristic aesthetic mixing vintage and AI elements.
passed_tests: API Root endpoint responding correctly (GET /api/)
Data seeding working (POST /api/seed)
Projects API returning 3+ project cards (GET /api/projects)
Gallery API with photo/AI_ART filters (GET /api/gallery)
Blog API with AI prompt articles (GET /api/blog)
Contact form submission with mocked email (POST /api/contact)
Contact form validation working correctly
Homepage loads with retro-futuristic hero: 'E se l'AI fosse esistita nel passato?'
Navigation with terminal-style brackets [Home] [Chi_Sono] [Progetti] etc
About section with vintage frame photo and AI detection overlay
Projects section with sepia filtered images and neon borders on hover
Gallery page with VINTAGE/AI_ART filters and bento grid layout
Blog page with terminal-style prompt blocks and AI prompts
Contact form with terminal card design (message_terminal.exe header)
Social links working (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook)
Mobile responsive menu working correctly
Retro-futuristic design elements: Special Elite font, cyan/amber neon accents, stone-950 background
Terminal-style UI elements throughout the site
Sepia vintage photo effects with hover transitions
CRT scanlines and film grain effects
Footer with temporal theme (1955-2026 TEMPORAL_RIGHTS_RESERVED)

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI components, navigation, and retro-futuristic design working)
